name: commipheric acid
summary: Guggul triterpenoid linked to lipid-signaling and inflammatory control.
description: Guggul triterpenoid linked to lipid signaling and inflammatory control; may influence nuclear receptor pathways relevant to atherosclerosis risk.
safetyNotes: Mostly preclinical or extract-derived; concentrated doses may affect glucose, lipids, liver enzymes, or bleeding risk depending matrix.
dosage: standardized extract or essential-oil-free preparation when oral use is intended
typical_dosage: standardized extract or essential-oil-free preparation when oral use is intended
